title: Welcome to SonaCMS
meta_description: A fresh SonaCMS installation. Log in to edit this page or create your own.

data.text: This is your new website. It's running on SonaCMS — a fast, flat-file content management system with no database to set up.
This page is just an example to get you started. To edit it, or to create pages of your own, log in to the admin area at /SonaCMS/ using the details in your config file.
A few things you can do

items: Create hierarchical pages with clean URLs
Add images, galleries, videos, buttons and file downloads
Build coloured sections like this one
Add a contact form that emails you submissions

data.text: When you're ready, delete this page or edit it to make it your own. Everything you see here was built with the same editor you'll use.
